lede: A look at March 7 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Kiyan Anthony and Ryan Ciminelli, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Sweden
events.desc: Sweden officially joins NATO, becoming its 32nd member.

events.title: 2021 Bata explosions
events.desc: At least 108 die and 615 are injured in the 2021 Bata explosions in Bata, Equatorial Guinea.

events.title: Reform of the House of Lords
events.desc: Reform of the House of Lords: The British House of Commons votes to make the upper chamber, the House of Lords, 100% elected.

events.title: Iran
events.desc: Iran and the United Kingdom break diplomatic relations after a fight over Salman Rushdie and his controversial novel, The Satanic Verses.

events.title: Aeroflot Flight 542
events.desc: Aeroflot Flight 542 crashes in the Yermakovsky District, killing all 31 aboard.

events.title: Ali Razmara
events.desc: Iranian prime minister Ali Razmara is assassinated by Khalil Tahmasebi, a member of the Islamic fundamentalist Fada'iyan-e Islam, outside a mosque in Tehran.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Günther Prien and the crew of German submarine U-47, one of the most successful U-boats of World War II, disappear without a trace.

events.title: Second Boer War
events.desc: Second Boer War: Boers, led by Koos de la Rey, defeat the British at the Battle of Tweebosch.

events.title: Battle of Craonne
events.desc: Emperor Napoleon I of France wins the Battle of Craonne.

events.title: Condemnations of 1210–1277
events.desc: The University of Paris issues the last in a series of condemnations of various philosophical and theological theses.

births.name: Jay Duplass
births.line: American actor, director, producer, and screenwriter

births.name: Julius Wagner-Jauregg
births.line: Austrian physician and academic, Nobel Prize laureate (died 1940)

deaths.text: Jamie Dunn, Australian actor, radio and television host
Edward Mills Purcell, American physicist and academic, Nobel Prize laureate
Bradbury Robinson, American football player, physician, and politician
Charles De Geer, Swedish entomologist and archaeologist

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Leonid Feodorov (Russian Greek Catholic Church)
Christian feast day: María Antonia de Paz y Figueroa
Christian feast day: Siméon-François Berneux (part of The Korean Martyrs)
Christian feast day: Teresa Margaret of the Sacred Heart
